meta.label: The Grand Loop
meta.notes: Pick up van Fri 1 Aug PM in Venice; return van AM Mon 17 Aug. Regions below are first-pass guesses from the Grand Loop route; the loop refines them with real campsites/stops.

nights.location: Lidostrasse 19, Lucerne (lakeside, 2.5km from old town, next to Lido swim)
Lauterbrunnen valley floor, facing Staubbach Falls (walk to village + Wengen/Mürren lifts)
Lauterbrunnen valley floor (stay put, van parked; value swap: Camping Schützenbach 1km south)

Grindelwald-Grund (valley-floor van pitch under the Eiger north face, 600m walk to Grindelwald Terminal for First gondola + Eiger Express; book 2-3mo ahead; value swap Camping Gletscherdorf ~CHF 44-58)

nights.region: Swiss Alps - Zermatt / Matterhorn gateway (app route: Aug 6 = Zermatt, not Lucerne — region guess corrected to match data/alpine.json)
nights.location: Randa, between the Randa & Täsch stations (working gateway pitch for car-free Zermatt ~CHF 33-46/night for 2+van Aug, renovated 2021 ~320 sockets + motorhome service; train into Zermatt every ~20min or shuttle-taxi ~CHF 7 each way; book 2-3mo ahead. NB old Camping Alphubel Täsch is permanently closed — rockfall/flood; van base 2 nights)

nights.region: Swiss Alps - Zermatt / Matterhorn (Gornergrat day; app route Aug 7 = matterhorn, drive=0)
nights.location: Randa (van stays put from Night 6; teardown-free morning, first train to Gornergrat via Täsch park-and-ride; GGB cog railway ~CHF 88pp return, sit RIGHT going up, Swiss Travel Pass ~50% off; value Riffelberg→Riffelsee walk-down for the reflection shot; cheaper swap Camping Mischabel Saas-Grund ~CHF 30-42)

nights.region: Austria - Innsbruck / Tirol (app route Aug 8 = innsbruck1, region austria; drives straight Zermatt→Innsbruck via Liechtenstein + Fernpass lakes — region guess Engadin/St Moritz corrected to match data/alpine.json)
nights.location: Kranebitter Allee 214, Innsbruck — the city's only proper campsite, riverside van pitches on the Inn under the Nordkette ~€36-46/night for 2+van Aug; bus O/J ~15min into the old town, on-site bar/restaurant; book ~1-2mo ahead. Value/quiet swap: Stellplatz Völs or Camping Natterer See ~7km SW ~€40-52. NB Innsbruck is a 2-night base (Nights 8+9), van stays put

nights.region: Austria - Tirol / Innsbruck (app route Aug 9 = innsbruck2, drive=0 — night 2 of the Innsbruck base)
nights.location: Kranebitter Allee 214, Innsbruck (van stays put from Night 8; riverside Inn pitches under the Nordkette ~€36-46/night for 2+van Aug, bus O/J ~15min to old town, on-site bar/restaurant; teardown-free Nordkette/Hungerburg morning; book both nights ~1-2mo ahead; value swap Camping Natterer See ~7km SW ~€40-52 lake-swim or Stellplatz Völs)

nights.region: Austria - Salzburg (app route Aug 10 = salzburg; region guess Zillertal/Stubai corrected to match data/alpine.json)
nights.location: Samstrasse 22A, NE Salzburg (~€38-50/night for 2+van Aug; pool, bus 6/21 ~20min to old town, easy A1 roll-in after Innsbruck; book ~1mo ahead; value swap Panorama Camping Stadtblick ~€36-48 fortress view or bare city Stellplatz)

nights.region: Austria - Hallstatt / Salzkammergut (app route Aug 11 = hallstatt, sleep Obertraun/Bad Goisern; region guess Hohe Tauern corrected to match data/alpine.json)
nights.location: Winkl 77, Lake Hallstatt south shore (~€34-46/night for 2+van Aug; own swim beach, Dachstein/Five Fingers cable car ~5min; ferry/cycle into Hallstatt early; book ~1-1.5mo ahead; value swap Bad Goisern Camping Lambichl ~€32-42, or pricier Klausner-Höll in Hallstatt ~€44-56)

nights.region: Austria - Grossglockner / Zell am See (app route Aug 12 = grossglockner, sleep Zell am See)
nights.location: Thumersbacher Strasse 34, Lake Zell east shore (~€42-56/night for 2+van Aug; swim jetty + restaurant, glacier sunset view; arrive after Grossglockner High Alpine Road toll ~€40/car; book 1-2mo ahead; value swap Sportcamp Woferlgut Bruck ~€38-50 or Panorama Camp Zell ~€34-44)

nights.region: Dolomites - Toblach/Dobbiaco, South Tyrol (app route Aug 13 = toblach, sleep Toblach/Niederdorf; region guess Alta Badia corrected to match data/alpine.json)
nights.location: Via Major 28 (~€40-54/night for 2+van Aug; pool/sauna, shop+restaurant, cycle path to Lago di Dobbiaco; bus 442/445 + Dolomiti SuperSummer card reach Tre Cime/Cortina van-parked; book 1-2mo ahead; value swap Camping Toblacher See ~€36-46)

nights.region: Dolomites - Pragser Wildsee/Tre Cime, base Cortina (app route Aug 14 = braies drive=0, sleep Cortina/Misurina)
nights.location: Località Fiames, SS51 ~4km N of Cortina (~€44-58/night for 2+van Aug; riverside pine pitches, bus into Cortina at gate; relocate from Toblach base toward Cortina, arrive Lago di Braies before 9am vehicle ban; book 1-2mo ahead; value swap Camping Cortina/Campo ~€46-60 or Misurina lakeside pitches)

nights.region: Dolomites - Seceda/Val Gardena, base Val di Fassa (app route Aug 15 = seceda drive=0, sleep Val Gardena/Bolzano; region guess Funes corrected to match data/alpine.json)
nights.location: Strada de Sèn Jan, Val di Fassa ~30min S of Ortisei (~€38-52/night for 2+van Aug; riverside pitches + pool, Catinaccio/Vajolet bus; day-trip Seceda cable car + Alpe di Siusi then drop over Pordoi/Sella; book 1-2mo ahead; value swap Camping Vidor Pozza ~€40-54 or Camping Moosbauer Bolzano ~€42-56 city base + easy A22 to Venice)

nights.region: Veneto - return toward Venice, base Mestre (app route Aug 16 = return, sleep Mestre)
nights.location: Via Giuseppe de Marchi 7 (~€36-50/night for 2+van Aug; closest proper campsite to Indie Campers Venice depot, pool+restaurant, ACTV bus ~15-20min to Piazzale Roma; pre-hand-back night — dump tanks/refill/clean van for 11:00 return; book ~1mo ahead; value swap Camping Venezia Marghera or Camping Fusina ~€34-46 lagoon vaporetto)

days.anchor: Gornergrat & Matterhorn finale (Zermatt 2nd day, van put)
Grossglockner High Alpine Road → Zell am See
Lago di Braies + Tre Cime di Lavaredo (relocate to Cortina)
stops: Tre Cime di Lavaredo loop (toll road) 10:00–14:30

days.anchor: Return van AM, Venice (no in-app stops — hand-back logistics)

bookings_to_make.note: First-to-sell: Lauterbrunnen, Grindelwald, Zermatt-Randa, Cortina, Braies area. Per-night ~€40-64 for van+2. Authored as per-night items in app checklist 'bookings-to-make'.

bookings_to_make.book_by: 1-2wk ahead — RESERVE TIMESLOT (only lift that needs advance in Aug)
bookings_to_make.note: First train cheapest; Swiss Travel/Half-Fare discount.

bookings_to_make.what: Grindelwald First gondola+activities (value pick vs Schilthorn)
bookings_to_make.note: Cheaper than Schilthorn; Cliff Walk + First Flyer.
Swiss Travel Pass ~50% off; sit RIGHT going up.
Road has 09-17h car-access ban; cable car avoids it.

bookings_to_make.what: Tre Cime di Lavaredo toll road

budget.value_optimization: Campervan IS the bed (no hotels). Cook-in-van breakfasts + ~half dinners; eat-out only the worthwhile splurges (Mürren fondue, Tyrolean/Südtirol). Free Alpine viewpoints + lake swims over paid lifts where possible; chose Grindelwald First over pricier Schilthorn; Swiss Travel/Half-Fare on Jungfraujoch+Gornergrat. Lowest-cost real pitches per night (value swaps noted in nights[]).

assumptions.campervan: Indie Campers Aug peak ~€130/day × 17 days = ~€2210 (already booked; excluded from on-trip total)
